_publications._publicationTitle: Performance Evaluation of SpliceAI for the Prediction of Splicing of

_contextSnippet: Under this value, the sensitivity and specificity were determined as 94.5% (95% confidence interval (CI), 86.6–98.5%) and 94.3% (95% CI, 90.3–97.0%), respectively.
details: Sensitivity of 94.5% (95% CI, 86.6–98.5%) and specificity of 94.3% (95% CI, 90.3–97.0%)
